steps.title: Recognize that the solution is the intersection point
steps.content: The solution to a system of linear equations is the point where the two lines cross on the graph. This point has coordinates that satisfy both equations at once.

steps.title: Read the intersection coordinates from the grid
steps.content: Identify where the two lines meet. Tracing vertically to the $x$-axis shows $x = 4$, and tracing horizontally to the $y$-axis shows $y = -5$. The intersection point is $(4, -5)$. That matches choice A — A is correct.
